2605.13737.title: Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs
2605.13737.paper_summary: When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that jointly process video, audio, and text, yet a basic form of grounding remains untested: catching a textual claim that conflicts with the model's own sensory input. We introduce IMAVB, a curated 500-clip benchmark of long-form movies with a 2x2 design crossing target modality (vision, audio) and premise condition (standard, misleading), which lets us measure conflict detection separately from ordinary multimodal comprehension. Across eight open-source omnimodal LLMs and Gemini 3.1 Pro, we document a Representation-Action Gap: hidden states reliably encode premise-perception mismatches even when the same models almost never reject the false claim in their outputs. Behaviorally, models fall into two failure modes: under-rejection, in which they answer misleading questions as if the false premise were true; and over-rejection, in which they reject more often but also reject standard questions, sacrificing ordinary comprehension accuracy. The gap is modality-asymmetric (audio grounding underperforms vision) and prompt-resistant across seven variants. As an initial diagnostic intervention, a probe-guided logit adjustment (PGLA) re-injects the encoded mismatch signal into decoding and consistently improves rejection behavior. Together, these results suggest the bottleneck for omnimodal grounding lies in translation, not perception.
2605.13737.paper_summary_zh: 當一個全模態大型語言模型接受一個文本前提與其實際看到或聽到的內容相矛盾的問題時，失敗是出在感知還是行動上？最近的全模態模型被定位為基於感知的代理，能夠共同處理視頻、音頻和文本，然而一種基本的基礎形式仍未經過測試：捕捉與模型自身感官輸入相衝突的文本主張。我們介紹了IMAVB，一個精心策劃的500段長片基準，具有2x2設計，交叉目標模態（視覺、音頻）和前提條件（標準、誤導），這使我們能夠將衝突檢測與普通的多模態理解分開測量。在八個開源全模態LLM和Gemini 3.1 Pro中，我們記錄了一個表徵-行動差距：隱藏狀態可靠地編碼前提-感知不匹配，即使相同的模型幾乎從不拒絕其輸出中的虛假主張。在行為上，模型陷入兩種失敗模式：低拒絕，其中它們像是虛假前提為真一樣回答誤導性問題；和高拒絕，其中它們拒絕的頻率更高，但也拒絕標準問題，犧牲了普通理解的準確性。這個差距是模態不對稱的（音頻基礎表現不如視覺），並且在七個變體中對提示具有抗性。作為初步的診斷介入，探針引導的邏輯調整（PGLA）將編碼的不匹配信號重新注入解碼中，並一致改善拒絕行為。綜合這些結果表明，全模態基礎的瓶頸在於翻譯，而非感知。
2605.13737.author: Trung Nguyen Quang et.al.
2605.13737.authors: Trung Nguyen Quang, Yiming Gao, Fanyi Pu, Kaichen Zhang, Shuo Sun, Ziwei Liu
